telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 26, 2026 Markets reflected classic stagflationary pressures today as geopolitical tensions sparked risk-off flows while inflationary concerns mounted. The VIX spike above 27 drove defensive positioning into gold near $4,364, as both crypto and equities sold off amid fears of economic stagnation. Late-cycle dynamics are clearly asserting themselves across asset classes. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $68,883 · ETH: $2,068 · SOL: $86.83 · GOLD: $4,364 · SPY: $645.09 (-1.2%) · QQQ: $573.79 (-1.7%) · VIX: $27.44 (+8.3%) · TLT: $86.11 (+0.1%) · DXY: $99.87 (+0.3%) · OIL: $93.47
